title: Expanded Bow Enchantings
description: This Datapack and Mod allow to use Looting on a Bow and allows Mending and Infinity to be on the same bow on the same Bow!
body: # Expanded Bow Enchantings **This Datapack and Mod** expands the Bow Enchantments to include Looting on a Bow and allows Mending and Infinity to be on the same Bow. It also allows you to mix different weapon enchantment types on the same Axe **‎◾Examples:** ![Expanded Bow Enchantings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b2ce08eae725f5cd4acd51bdf5287aa6b98484a.jpeg) ![Expanded Bow Enchantings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/592ad7fa98a58eb7dbfc046e12af481d117bcbe9.jpeg) ## Details📝 - **Expanded Bow Enchantings** is **compatible** with versions **1.21 to 1.21.11** - **Expanded Bow Enchantings** adds new **(expansion)** to enchanting table🌐 - **Expanded Bow Enchantings** is compatible with any **enchantings datapacks** - **No** it is necessary to **unzip** the downloaded file 🗂️ ## More Projects:
